title: Full Transcript: QuantumScape Q1 2026 Earnings Call
text: QuantumScape completed installation of its Eagle Line production facility and commenced QSE5 cell production in Q1 2026. The company plans to ramp production in Q2 to support customer programs across automotive and emerging markets. GAAP net loss: $100.8 million. Adjusted EBITDA loss: $63.2 million. Customer billings: $11 million (first billings from ecosystem partners). Liquidity: $904.7 million. Full-year guidance: Adjusted EBITDA loss between $250-275 million; capex between $40-60 million. Management highlighted engagement with four of the top 10 global automotive OEMs across major geographies. The company continues to work through two Joint Development Agreements with top 10 global automotive OEMs and successfully completed technology evaluations with additional partners. Beyond automotive, QuantumScape is targeting AI data centers and defense applications, citing advantages in energy density and safety. The company added industry veterans to its board to support these new market opportunities. The ecosystem-generated customer billings represent a milestone for the capital-light licensing model, demonstrating partner investment in the technology platform.
